nasb.text: Why did I ever come forth from the womb To look on trouble and sorrow, So that my days have been spent in shame?

esv.text: Why did I come out from the womb to see toil and sorrow, and spend my days in shame?

cnv.text: 我為甚麼要出母胎， 經歷勞苦和憂傷， 並且我的年日都消逝在羞辱之中呢？

ccb.text: 为什么我要从母胎出来， 经历患难和痛苦， 在羞辱中度过一生呢？
